mapper.insert: INSERT INTO heritage_item (serial_number, region_id, region_name, category_id, category_name, title, declaration_region, protection_unit, description, cover_image, video_url, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{serialNumber}, #{regionId}, #{regionName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{title}, #{declarationRegion}, #{protectionUnit}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{videoUrl}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE heritage_item SET serial_number = #{serialNumber}, region_id = #{regionId}, region_name = #{regionName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, category_name = #{categoryName}, title = #{title}, declaration_region = #{declarationRegion}, protection_unit = #{protectionUnit}, description = #{description}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT region_name AS city, COUNT(*) AS count FROM heritage_item WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT hc.name, COUNT(hi.id) AS count FROM heritage_item hi JOIN heritage_category hc ON hi.category_id = hc.id WHERE hi.status = 1 GROUP BY hc.id, hc.name ORDER BY count DESC
